# hetzner_boot_vnc (Data Source)

Read VNC install boot configuration for a Hetzner dedicated server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_boot_vnc" "example" {
  server_number = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether VNC install is currently active.
- `dist` (String) Active distribution or empty if inactive.
- `lang` (String) Active language or empty if inactive.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated password (only available when active).
- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address.
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network.
